results.title: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez Offers Forceful Advice For TV Stations About Trump's Thursday Speech
results.description: The progressive congresswoman was asked for her take on the somewhat mysterious address Trump has announced -- and she delivered.

results.title: Cardinal to file legal action against MP Chamara Sampath
results.description: Archbishop of Colombo Cardinal Malcolm Ranjith is to file legal action against MP Chamara Sampath Dassanayake for making false statements, Cardinal’s spokesman Fr. Cyril Gamini Fernando said today.
